name: election-prediction
description: Monorepo: React + Vite frontend + Kerala (FastAPI) and Tamil Nadu (stdlib HTTP) backends.

scripts.dev:kerala: bash -c 'cd backend/kerala && PORT=8001 HOST=0.0.0.0 uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001'
scripts.dev:tamilnadu: bash -c 'cd backend/tamilnadu && PORT=8002 HOST=0.0.0.0 python server.py'
